Number of copies in the game: Number of copies in the game
Perfect tie! All players each have {scor: Perfect tie! All players each have {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
Perfect tie! {player1} and {player2} eac: Perfect tie! {player1} and {player2} each have {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
Perfect tie! {player1}, {player2} and {p: Perfect tie! {player1}, {player2} and {player3} each have {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
Perfect tie! {player1}, {player2}, {play: Perfect tie! {player1}, {player2}, {player3} and {player4} each have {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
Score calculation… Who will be the Supre: Score calculation… Who will be the Supreme Leader?
Victory! You win the game with {score} p: Victory! You win the game with {score} points
Victory! You win the game with {score} points and {developments} developments built
Victory! You win the game with {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
{player} wins the game with {score} poin: {player} wins the game with {score} points and {developments} developments built
{player} wins the game with {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
You can still build a card. Are you sure: You can still build a card. Are you sure you want to finish the game without building it?
You have finished your first game! You c: You have finished your first game! You can now play with your friends, or meet other players via our chat room on Discord.
You have {quantity, plural, one{# Financ: You have {quantity, plural, one{# Financier token} other{# Financier tokens}}
You have {quantity, plural, one{# Genera: You have {quantity, plural, one{# General token} other{# General tokens}}
You receive a {character, select, Financ: You receive a {character, select, Financier{Financier} other{General}} for producing the most {resource, select, Materials{Materials} Energy{Energy} Science{Science} Gold{Gold} other{Exploration}}
{player} has {quantity, plural, one{# Fi: {player} has {quantity, plural, one{# Financier token} other{# Financier tokens}}
{player} has {quantity, plural, one{# Ge: {player} has {quantity, plural, one{# General token} other{# General tokens}}
{player} receives a {character, select,: {player} receives a {character, select, Financier{Financier} other{General}} for producing the most {resource, select, Materials{Materials} Energy{Energy} Science{Science} Gold{Gold} other{Exploration}}
The player producing the single most Ene: The player producing the single most Energy receives a General token
The player producing the single most Exp: The player producing the single most Exploration receives a General token
The player producing the single most Gol: The player producing the single most Gold receives a Financier token
The player producing the single most Mat: The player producing the single most Materials receives a Financier token
The player producing the single most Sci: The player producing the single most Science receives a Financier or General token
For information, in a 2-player game, eac: For your information, in a 2-player game, each player receives 10 cards for the draft. However, the last 3 cards not chosen are discarded.
Players reveal the card they have chosen: Players reveal the card they have chosen
Sending move to the Supreme Leader…: Sending move to the Supreme Leader…
There is {discardLength} cards in the di: There are {discardLength} cards in the discard pile.
This is the last round! It’s time to sco: This is the last round! It’s time to score as many victory points as possible. As a reminder, Krystallium does not earn you points at the end.
header.draft.left: The players pass the rest of the cards to the left
header.draft.players: Players must choose a development card
header.draft.right: The players pass the rest of the cards to the right
header.draft.you: Choose a card and place it in your draft area
header.planning.place: Place your resources on your developments under construction or your Empire card
header.planning.players: Players have to do their planning
header.planning.you: You must slate for construction or recycle each card in your draft area
header.production.players: Players must use the resources produced
header.production.you: Place the resources produced on your developments under construction or your Empire card
header.validate.produce: Click on <validate>Validate</validate> if you are ready to proceed to {resource, select, 1{Materials} 2{Energy} 3{Science} 4{Gold} 5{Exploration} other{Krystallium}} production
header.validate.round: Click on <validate>Validate</validate> if you are ready to proceed to the next round
header.validate.scoring: Click on <validate>Validate</validate> to proceed to the scores
help.action.place.hint: You can long-click on the card to place <resources/> at once.
help.character.obtain.construction: Some Development cards also give a character token as a construction bonus when built.
help.character.obtain.supremacy: Character tokens are awarded as supremacy bonuses during the Production phase. The player who produces the most of a given resource, alone, receives a token.
help.character.scoring.description: At the end of the game, each character token that is not placed on a card is worth 1 victory point. Some Empire cards and Developments also score bonus points per character token.
help.character.use.description: Character tokens can be placed on Development cards that require them as part of their construction cost. They can also be used to directly build a card by paying its full remaining cost at once.
help.deck.ascension.description: At the beginning of each round, {count} cards from this deck are dealt to each player.
help.deck.ascension.title: Corruption & Ascension card deck
help.development.constructionBonus.descr: Received immediately when the Development is built.
help.development.hidden.title: Development card
help.development.production.bonus: War or Peace campaign bonus cards produce Krystallium and character tokens during an additional production phase, after the Exploration production.
help.development.production.corruption: Certain Corruption & Ascension cards produce Corruption. If you have any of these in your Empire, subtract the corrupted resources from your total production.
help.development.recyclingBonus.descript: Received when discarding this card during the Planning phase.
help.empire.conversion: Every 5 resource cubes placed on the Empire card are converted into 1 Krystallium.
help.empire.description: Each player starts with an Empire card that provides a base production.
help.hidden.draft: This card is in the draft area of {player}.
help.krystallium: You can use 1 Krystallium to replace any Resource. However, you cannot use it to replace a Character.
help.krystallium.obtain.bonus: Some Development cards produce Krystallium as a construction bonus.
help.krystallium.obtain.conversion: Every 5 resource cubes placed on your Empire card are automatically converted into 1 Krystallium.
help.krystallium.persist: Unlike other resource cubes, Krystallium is kept from one round to the next.
help.krystallium.use: Krystallium is a wild resource: it can replace any resource cube when paying the construction cost of a Development. However, it cannot replace a Character token.
help.planning.description: You must make a decision for each Development card in your Draft area. For each card, you have 2 options:
help.planning.recycle.description: Discard the card and collect the card's Recycling Bonus. Place the resource either directly on a card Under Construction, or on your Empire card.
help.planning.slate.description: Move the card into your Construction area (the card is considered "Under Construction").
help.planning.title: Planning phase
help.production.bonus.choice: The player who produces the most {resource}, alone, receives a Financier or General token (their choice).
help.production.bonus.financier: The player who produces the most {resource}, alone, receives a Financier token.
help.production.bonus.general: The player who produces the most {resource}, alone, receives a General token.
help.production.description: Each player simultaneously produces {resource} cubes. Count the {resource} symbols on your Empire card and all your built Developments. You receive that many {resource} cubes.
help.production.placement.description: Each produced resource must immediately be placed on a Development under construction (on an empty cost slot of the matching type) or on your Empire card. Every 5 resources on your Empire card are immediately converted into 1 Krystallium.
help.production.status.nobody: Currently, nobody would win the bonus (no production or tie).
help.resource.association.1: Materials are always required to build Structure cards.
help.resource.association.2: Energy is always required to build Vehicle cards.
help.resource.association.3: Science is always required to build Research cards.
help.resource.association.4: Gold is always required to build Project cards.
help.resource.association.5: Exploration is always required to build Discovery cards.
help.resource.obtain.production: Production: during the Production phase, each player produces resources based on the symbols on their Empire card and their built Developments.
help.resource.obtain.recycling: Recycling: during the Planning phase, discarding a card from your Draft area gives you a resource cube as a recycling bonus.
help.resource.use.construction: Place them on Development cards Under Construction to pay their construction cost. Each cost slot requires a specific resource type.
help.resource.use.empire: Place them on your Empire card. Every 5 resource cubes on the Empire card are automatically converted into 1 Krystallium.
help.rounds.description: The game takes place over 4 rounds. Each round includes a Draft phase followed by a Planning phase and a Production phase.
help.rounds.draft.description: During the Draft phase, players pass their remaining cards to their neighbor after picking one card each turn.
help.rounds.draft.direction: Cards are passed to the left in rounds 1 and 3, and to the right in rounds 2 and 4.
help.rounds.title: Game rounds
Tutorial: choose the card {card} and pla: Tutorial: choose the card {card} and place it in your draft area
Tutorial: place your resources on the {c: Tutorial: place your resources on the {card} card
Tutorial: select the card {card} and pla: Tutorial: select the card {card} and place it in your construction area
Tutorial: select the card {card} and rec: Tutorial: select the card {card} and recycle it
tuto.blue.cube.here: By recycling the Zeppelin, you get a blue cube. However, none of your cards under construction require this resource.
tuto.blue.cube.here.title: The blue cube is here
tuto.build.ic.1: Your 3 Materials will allow you to complete the construction of the Industrial Complex.
tuto.build.ic.2: You have several options: drag the card to the left, click and hold on the card, move the cubes one by one, or click on the card to zoom in and see all the available actions.
tuto.build.ic.title: Build the Industrial Complex
tuto.built.cards: The Industrial Complex is now part of your Empire, and increases your production by 1 Materials and 1 Gold.
tuto.built.cards.title: Built cards
tuto.cards.production: Some cards produce resources once built. For example, the Industrial Complex will produce a grey resource (Materials) and a yellow one (Gold).
tuto.cards.production.title: Cards production
tuto.character.tokens: Another way to score victory points is to accumulate Financiers and Generals. Each gives you 1 point.
tuto.character.tokens.title: Character tokens
tuto.choose.first.card: Move the Secret Society to your draft area. We will see later why this card is strategic for you.
tuto.choose.first.card.title: Choose your first card
tuto.choose.harbor.zone: It is expensive to build (5 Gold), but it will then produce a lot each turn (2 Materials and 2 Gold).
tuto.choose.harbor.zone.title: Now choose the Harbor Zone.
tuto.choose.industrial.complex: This card will provide you with a good start.
tuto.choose.industrial.complex.title: Choose the Industrial Complex.
tuto.choose.propaganda.center: Thanks to this card, you will be able to produce more and more Gold!
tuto.choose.propaganda.center.title: Now choose the Propaganda Center.
tuto.choose.universal.exposition: As with the Wind Turbines, we will be able to recycle this card, but this time to win one Gold.
tuto.choose.universal.exposition.title: Choose the Universal Exposition
tuto.choose.wind.turbines: This card is not necessarily interesting to build, but we will be able to make good use of it anyway!
tuto.choose.wind.turbines.title: Choose the Wind Turbines.
tuto.construction.bonus: In addition, by completing the construction of certain cards, you can win a bonus indicated here: you earned a second Financier token!
tuto.construction.bonus.general: By completing the construction of the Propaganda Center, you have won a General, which will give you 1 victory point at the end of the game.
tuto.construction.cost: The resources will allow you to build the cards. For example, the Industrial Complex costs 3 Materials (in grey) and 1 Energy (in black).
tuto.context: In It’s a Wonderful World, you are leading an expanding Empire. You must choose the path that will get you to develop faster and better than your competitors!
tuto.draft.direction: These arrows indicate the direction of the cards for this round.
tuto.draft.direction.title: Draft direction
tuto.draft.phase: Each player receives 7 cards. You must choose 1 card and pass the rest to the Republic of Europe.
tuto.draft.phase.title: Draft phase
tuto.each.round: You have until the end of the game to complete the construction of your cards. Try to build the Harbor Zone quickly, to benefit from its production! The Secret Society does not produce anything, you can safely wait until turn 4 to finish it.
tuto.each.round.title: Each round goes like this
tuto.empire.production: Fortunately, you don’t start without production! Your Empire will produce 3 Materials and 1 Gold every round.
tuto.empire.production.title: Empire production
tuto.end.first.round: We are now in round 2, and a new Draft phase begins. The direction of the cards is reversed every turn.
tuto.end.first.round.title: End of the first round
tuto.end.of.draft: You have automatically retrieved the last card passed by the Federation of Asia, a Zeppelin.
tuto.end.of.draft.title: End of Draft
tuto.energy.production: The player producing the most Energy wins a General token. However, your 2 opponents are tied: in this case, no one wins a token.
tuto.exploration.production: You do not produce any Exploration. Validate now to proceed to the next round.
tuto.financier.tokens: Here is your token. As a reminder, it gives you 1 victory point, + 1 thanks to your Empire. Once the Secret Society is built, it will be 1 additional point per Financier.
tuto.financier.tokens.title: Financier Tokens
tuto.flow.game: A game is played in 4 rounds. We will guide you through the first round to teach you how to play, then you will be free to make your own choices!
tuto.flow.game.title: Playing the game
tuto.flow.round: A round consists of 3 phases that players play simultaneously: Draft, Planning and Production.
tuto.flow.round.title: Playing a round
tuto.goal: The game consists in choosing and building Development cards. Some of these cards yield victory points. The player with the most victory points at the end of the game wins!
tuto.goal.title: Goal of the game
tuto.gold.production: You produce 2 Gold (one thanks to your Empire and one thanks to the Industrial Complex).
tuto.gold.production.late: Your new Gold production comes too late for this round, but will be useful in future rounds.
tuto.gold.supremacy: The Federation of Asia produces 1 Gold more than you and therefore receives the Financier token. Try to produce more next rounds to win the Supremacy bonus!
tuto.krystallium.cost: Some cards, such as the Secret Society, require Krystallium to be built.
tuto.krystallium.cost.title: Krystallium cost
tuto.krystallium.generation: However, if there are 5 cubes on your Empire card (regardless of their color), they are converted into 1 red cube, Krystallium.
tuto.krystallium.generation.title: Generating Krystallium
tuto.krystallium.use: Krystallium can replace any cube to build a card, and can be used at any time.
tuto.krystallium.use.title: Using Krystallium
tuto.materials.production: All players start by producing Materials. You produce 3 of them, which are available here.
tuto.order.production.1: The Materials production step has already started, so it’s too late to produce an additional Materials this round, but you will benefit from it for the 3 remaining rounds.
tuto.order.production.2: On the other hand, the Gold production step hasn’t started yet, so you’ll get an extra Gold starting this round!
tuto.order.production.title: Order of production
tuto.other.strategies: This card earns 3 victory points per green building built.
tuto.other.strategies.cost: However, to build it we would have to spend 2 precious Financiers!
tuto.other.strategies.title: Other strategies…
tuto.place.energy.industrial: Now drag the black cube, obtained by recycling the Wind Turbines, to the Industrial Complex.
tuto.place.energy.industrial.title: Place the Energy on the Industrial Complex
tuto.place.gold.propaganda: Drag this yellow cube to your Propaganda Center to start building it.
tuto.place.gold.propaganda.title: Place the Gold on the Propaganda Center
tuto.placement.resources.1: You can always choose to place your resources on your Empire card; however Krystallium does not earn points at the end of the game.
tuto.placement.resources.2: It is best to build your cards: complete the construction of the Propaganda Center.
tuto.placement.resources.title: Placing your resources
tuto.planning.phase: We now move on to the second phase of the round, the Planning: each card chosen in the previous phase must be put under construction or recycled.
tuto.planning.phase.title: Planning phase
tuto.production.phase: The production phase takes place in 5 stages: one per resource, in the order of the production line: grey, black, green, yellow and finally blue.
tuto.production.phase.title: Production phase
tuto.proportional.production: Once built, the Propaganda Center will produce as much Gold as you have yellow cards built.
tuto.proportional.production.title: Proportional production
tuto.recycle.universal.exposition: Drag this card to the Recycling Zone, above the Construction Zone: it will be more useful this way.
tuto.recycle.universal.exposition.title: Recycle the Universal Exposition
tuto.recycle.wind.turbine: Now drag the Wind Turbines to the recycling area, to get a black cube this time.
tuto.recycle.wind.turbine.title: Recycle the Wind Turbines
tuto.recycle.zeppelin: This card costs 2 Energy (which you do not produce) and produces 1 blue cube (Exploration), not very useful for our strategy: recycle it.
tuto.recycle.zeppelin.title: Recycle the Zeppelin
tuto.recycling.bonus: During Planning, each card can offer you a resource if you discard it. For the Wind Turbines, it is an Energy, as indicated here.
tuto.recycling.bonus.energy: It’s a good thing: we lacked one Energy to build the Industrial Complex!
tuto.recycling.bonus.gold: By recycling the Universal Exposition during the Planning phase, we obtained a Gold that can be used immediately.
tuto.recycling.info: You can recycle a card from your Construction Zone at any time. However, the cubes placed on it will be lost and its recycling bonus must be put on your Empire card.
tuto.recycling.info.title: Recycling
tuto.science.production: The player with the most Science can choose either a Financier Token or a General Token. Here, the Republic of Europe has taken a General.
tuto.simultaneous.choice: As you can see, the Federation of Asia has given you 6 cards. The players choose 1 card simultaneously and pass the rest to the next player.
tuto.simultaneous.choice.title: Simultaneous choice
tuto.slate.harbor.zone: Once built, this card will produce 2 Materials and 2 Gold each turn, but will also yield 2 victory points at the end of the game.
tuto.slate.harbor.zone.title: Start the Construction of the Harbor Zone
tuto.slate.industrial.complex: We want to build this card. So move it to the Construction Area.
tuto.slate.industrial.complex.title: Let’s start with the Industrial Complex
tuto.slate.propaganda.center: Also slate the Propaganda Center into the Construction Area.
tuto.slate.propaganda.center.title: Start the construction of the Propaganda Center.
tuto.slate.secret.society: The Secret Society fits perfectly into your strategy, since once built it will also earn you 1 point per Financier token: put it under construction.
tuto.slate.secret.society.title: Start the Construction of the Secret Society
tuto.supremacy.bonus: At each production step, the Empire that produces the most wins a General or a Financier. You produce the most Materials, so you win a Financier token!
tuto.supremacy.bonus.title: Supremacy Bonus
tuto.total.production: The total production of each player is displayed here. You will produce at least 4 Materials and 3 Gold in the next round!
tuto.total.production.title: Total production
tuto.types.of.cards: The Secret Society and the Propaganda Center are both yellow cards. The symbol at the bottom right of the cards is a reminder of their type.
tuto.types.of.cards.title: Types of cards
tuto.undo: In the menu, the [↺] button allows you to undo your last move: it is displayed in red when it is allowed.
tuto.undo.title: You can change your mind!
tuto.useless.resources.1: A resource that cannot be used immediately must be placed here on your Empire card.
tuto.useless.resources.2: The Resources on your Empire card can no longer be used to build Development cards.
tuto.useless.resources.title: Useless resources?
tuto.validate.energy: Actions such as recycling a card or placing a Krystallium to complete a construction are possible at any time. You must therefore validate your turn at each production step, even if you don’t produce anything!
tuto.validate.gold: As usual, validate to proceed to the next step.
tuto.validate.planning: You must click on Validate to show the other players that you have completed your planning.
tuto.validate.production: Once you have placed all your resources, you must validate to let other players know that you are ready.
tuto.validate.science: Although you don't produce any Science, you still have to validate again.
tuto.validate.title: Don’t forget to validate!
tuto.victory.points: Down here, you can see that the Propaganda Center earns 1 victory point at the end of the game, if built.
tuto.watch.opponents: By clicking on your opponents, you can see their Empire. "If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles." - Sun Tzu
tuto.watch.opponents.title: Keep an eye on your opponents
tuto.welcome: Welcome to the tutorial for It's a Wonderful World
tuto.yellow.cube.there: You only need 2 more Gold to complete the construction of the Propaganda Center.
tuto.yellow.cube.there.title: The yellow cube is there
tuto.your.empire: This is your Empire: the Noram States.
tuto.your.empire.title: Your Empire
tuto.your.opponents: In this tutorial, you play against 2 opponents controlled by the machine: the Republic of Europe and Federation of Asia.
tuto.your.opponents.title: Your opponents
tuto.your.strategy: Your Empire gives you a strategic bonus: each Financier token earns you an extra point!
tuto.your.strategy.title: Your strategy
tuto.your.turn: You can now finish the game making your own choices. Good luck!
tuto.your.turn.title: It’s up to you!
